{{Quote|He is an excellent choice for missions that require an inside man who can improvise on the run. I'll never forget the time he got me off Boden during an Imperial occupation: he dressed me up in this horrendous outfit and passed me off as his Kloo horn player.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Cracken's]] report on [[Leger DeMain]]|<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Operatives">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>}}
'''Boden''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Boden system/Legends|Boden system]]. Some time before [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Leger DeMain]] once helped [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] escape capture during an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupation of the planet.<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Operatives" />
